title: Designing a Conversational AI
scenario: Create a conversational AI chat interface for a customer support platform. The system should be able to recognize emotions and respond empathetically. The input should be a natural language query from a customer with a complaint, and the output should be a polite and reassuring response. The response should include a solution or next step to resolve the issue. The AI should be able to handle follow-up questions and maintain a consistent tone.
constraints: Must include a state machine diagram for the different emotional states
Must include a code snippet for the AI's decision tree

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the response adheres to the constraints on length and includes a state machine diagram and decision tree code
Check if the response is polite and reassuring, and maintains a consistent tone
Check if the response includes a clear solution or next step to resolve the issue
Check if the response can handle follow-up questions and maintains a consistent tone
